channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #107 - 2026-04-24
item.description:
📰 Toyota and Wipro 3D partner to build AM Center of Excellence in India India’s bid to become an additive manufacturing pioneer continues with the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding between Toyota Kirloskar Motor (TKM) and Wipro 3D to establish a Center of … The post Toyota and... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Toyota-AM-Centre-of-Excellence-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/toyota-and-wipro-3d-partner-to-build-am-center-of-excellence-in-india

📰 Designers take eyewear styles to the next level with Visages 3D printing Go into any eyewear shop and you’ll be greeted with a plethora of choices, from round rimless glasses, to cat-eye frames, to the classic browline style. Despite the choice, many … The post Designers take eyewear styles to the next level with Visages 3D printing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/visages-2-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/designers-take-eyewear-styles-to-the-next-level-with-visages-3d-printing

🖨 Mintion releases external filtration unit for enclosed 3D printers Mintion, a young Chinese company specializing in 3D printer accessories, has released the 3D Printer Filtration System V1, an external air filtration unit designed to reduce particle and volatile organic … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/3D_Printer_filter_V1_3d_print_farm_1800x1800-1-e1776951482571-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/mintion-releases-external-filtration-unit-for-enclosed-3d-printers

🚀 MX3D Completes PIONEER Project, Proving Hybrid WAAM Ready for Civil Engineering at Scale MX3D, a Dutch company specializing in robotic Wire Arc Additive Manufacturing (WAAM), has announced the conclusion of the PIONEER project, an EU Horizon-funded initiative in which the company served as a pilot line... The effort centered on industrializing automated design, fabrication, and certification workflows for structurally optimized, load-bearing hybrid…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Screenshot-2026-04-20-at-15.08.29-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/mx3d-completes-pioneer-project-proving-hybrid-waam-ready-for-civil-engineering-at-scale-250753

🦺 Fraunhofer IAP and NMI develop 3D printed biomimetic tissue substitute for medical implant applications Researchers at the Fraunhofer Institute for Applied Polymer Research (IAP) and the NMI Natural and Medical Sciences Institute have developed a multilayer biomimetic tissue substitute designed to replicate the... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Fraunhofer-IAP-biomimetic-tissue-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/fraunhofer-iap-and-nmi-develop-3d-printed-biomimetic-tissue-substitute-for-medical-implant-applications

📰 Rapid 2026 shows pragmatic & practical side of AM industry Walking into the Rapid + TCT exhibition halls in Boston felt like a shock of energy, the hum of conversation, the clack of demos, and the unmistakable jolt you only … The post Rapid 2026 shows pragmatic & practical... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Rapid2026_Seaport-Boston-MA-Home-of-Rapid-TCT-2026-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/rapid-2026-shows-pragmatic-practical-side-of-am-industry

🏠 ROBOZE announced as lead of Italian Armed Forces R&D project The DIgitales partes Ad Necessitatem Armatorum (DIANA) project is designed to develop new technological infrastructures to support the Italian Armed Forces and the Navy. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/ARGO-500-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/roboze-announced-as-lead-of-italian-armed-forces-r-d-project

📰 AMGTA releases independent report establishing how AM should be evaluated across part, system & enterprise levels The AMGTA says it is designed for use in investor presentations, policy discussions, procurement conversations, and organisational decision-making. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 23, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Binder_Jet_-_P-50_2.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/amgta-releases-independent-report-establishing-how-am-should-be-evaluated-across-part-system-enterprise-levels

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #106 - 2026-04-23
item.description:
🔥 3D Printing Reinvented? The Rise of Liquid Printing - vocal.media 3D Printing Reinvented? The Rise of Liquid Printing vocal.media, reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 22, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxNQVZySHNqUm11eVJKQ1NCMFNfVnpVOFFfRm5pcjBsVUJsamo3YWZ2MVI1UUdRLVFMSVpwT2ZPWG1QRVhKNXYwOWhaSndvc0tVUS01cUNMejBvMXc0TG9NaWt5Mmo1S2Y1UW01ZVdqOHhvLWNRbzF1SktKVzQ2TTVkTlBhZEJBUQ?oc=5

🚨 Bambu Lab Discontinues the X1 Series After Four Years on the Market As of March 31, 2026, the Bambu Lab X1, X1 Carbon, and X1E have officially ceased production. The company confirmed that while manufacturing and active sales have ended, support will continue through March 2031, covering spare parts, technical assistance, and firmware security patches, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 22, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/X1-hero-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/bambu-lab-discontinues-the-x1-series-after-four-years-on-the-market-250791

🔥 Stop trusting viral 3D printer hacks—they're hiding the real problems with your machine - How-To Geek Stop trusting viral 3D printer hacks—they're hiding the real problems with your machine How-To Geek Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 21, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNR1Y1Qnc0cVRlNmhTNmMzSUhmUW9VYzVKUHJUdlBGbXlNYjFULUNBZmZ3dnNLQTZNQ1lkSnBXc0tVaTFUYTBLX21RZ3VJS0JOTzZOUU9TU1dQZDFMT0VBYi1tNjVNVjVpR09BWEpaWnFNMGRwQkozczMxS2VjWF84NXpWUHVFa1JJbVgyTUhiaE1RbmNHaE5Oa3JNRXlsZw?oc=5

🦺 Swiss researchers develop 3D printed and polymer-coated implant prototypes for infant mitral valve repair Researchers at HEPIA, part of the University of Applied Sciences and Arts Western Switzerland (HES-SO) in Geneva, have developed and characterized a series of leaflet and valve implant prototypes aimed … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 22, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/HEPIA-heart-valves-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/swiss-researchers-develop-3d-printed-and-polymer-coated-implant-prototypes-for-infant-mitral-valve-repair

💻 Colibrium Additive secures $31 million NAVAIR contract The contract covers a series of deliverables that are designed to bolster US Navy operational readiness. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/COADPR001b-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/colibrium-additive-secures-31-million-navair-contract

🖨 Farsoon introduces Fine Laser Spot metal additive manufacturing capability The feature is said to achieve dimensional accuracy down to 0.03 mm. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Fine-Laser-Spot-Printing_Figure03.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/farsoon-introduces-fine-laser-spot-metal-additive-manufacturing-capability

🖨 Velo3D partners with Andretti Performance for 2026 IMSA Michelin Pilot Challenge Velo3D, the company specializing in advanced metal additive mission-critical parts, has entered into an agreement with racing team Andretti Performance. The deal, in which Velo3D becomes an official sponsor and … The post Velo3D partners with Andretti Performance for 2026 IMSA Michelin Pilot Challenge appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Andretti-Velo3D-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/velo3d-partners-with-andretti-performance-for-2026-imsa-michelin-pilot-challenge

🖨 Industrial & entry-level printer shipments both up in Q4 25, but professional & midrange shipments contract - CONTEXT CONTEXT has published its latest AM machine shipment report for Q4 and Full Year 2025. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 22, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/0-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/industrial-entry-level-printer-shipments-both-up-in-q4-25-but-professional-midrange-shipments-contract-context

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #105 - 2026-04-22
item.description:
🚀 Beehive Industries lands $29.7M USAF contract for 3D-printed Frenzy jet engines The U.S. Air Force awarded Beehive funding to integrate, flight-test, and qualify the 200 lbf Frenzy 8 while advancing the 100 lbf Frenzy 6 for uncrewed systems and standoff weapons. Under the SET/FAMM effort, this is part of the Pentagon's affordable-mass push; reporting on Beehive's additive approach cites reduced part count, faster scaling, and claims of up to 60% lower cost versus traditional manufacturing. Read more ? https://beehive-industries.ghost.io/beehive-industries-awarded-29-7-million-contract-by-u-s-air-force-for-frenzy-engine-family-development/

ðŸš¨ Never Mind the X2D, New Bambu Studio Update Adds Filament Color Mixing Feature - All3DP Never Mind the X2D, New Bambu Studio Update Adds Filament Color Mixing Feature All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 21, 2026. Key specs: 2 hotends, an actively heated chamber, and an integrated exhaust/air-filtration system. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNdEJ2VU5nclRZS0xDNXZWTlFOUldKWkpKUDhnNy14RVUxeE9oSTVDZFhDZTY2NHJSckFabUJORW9wTklfSUkyN2Utbk9jRFAyMS01MEN4bEQ3dkNLUERqbHBNTFNkZ1V2TTlkR3VmQmMwcmhFeHR2YnJvWFlWTU5teFJoNFhuYm1oY0UxaHRCbWdBd0NtMFU2LVdnRTd3YzFu?oc=5

â™»ï¸ Turn Waste into Wonder: Creality M1 & R1 Desktop Filament Maker is Taking Indiegogo by Storm - MacSources Turn Waste into Wonder: Creality M1 & R1 Desktop Filament Maker is Taking Indiegogo by Storm MacSources Reported by Google News - Filament Recycling on Apr 20, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

ðŸ’» Did Industry Misjudge AMâ€™s Value? Findings from AMGTA Explain The Bias The 2026 edition of our AMA: Energy online conference returns on April 30th. The Additive Manufacturing Green Trade Association (AMGTA) has published its 2026 Vision Paper laying out an evaluative framework for assessing AMâ€™s resource efficiency across entire production systems, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 21, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/amgta-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/did-industry-misjudge-ams-value-findings-from-amgta-explain-the-bias-250781

ðŸ’» Deportivo de La CoruÃ±a opens 3D printed retail store Spanish soccer club Real Club Deportivo de La CoruÃ±a has utilized a combination of large-scale 3D printing, artificial intelligence and architectural design to undertake a major overhaul of its official â€¦ The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 21, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Noumena-Deportivo-store-05-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/deportivo-de-la-coruna-opens-3d-printed-retail-store

ðŸ–¨ EOS acquires 100% stake in Metalpine With this acquisition, EOS says it further strengthens its strategic focus on materials, particularly in response to the growing demand for titanium additive manufacturing. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 21, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Metalpine_Graz-Austria.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/eos-acquires-100-stake-in-metalpine

ðŸ“° Additive Manufacturing Users Group awards six DINOs "They each share a high regard for AMUG and the overall AM industry, and they are willing to share their knowledge with others." Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 21, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/AMUG_2026_DINOs.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/additive-manufacturing-users-group-awards-six-dinos

ðŸ’» Local parts inventory & refreshed maintenance program among several customer-focused updates at ExOne â€œThese updates are a direct response to recent customer feedback around domestic supply, expedited parts access, predictable pricing, and support they can count on.â€ Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 21, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/VX_Facility_VX-Detroit_-S-Max-and-VX4000-machine-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/local-parts-inventory-refreshed-maintenance-program-among-several-customer-focused-updates-at-exone

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #104 - 2026-04-21
item.description:
🚨 Bambu Lab launches X2D dual-extrusion 3D printer - Engineering.com Bambu Lab launches X2D dual-extrusion 3D printer Engineering.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 20, 2026. Key specs: 2 hotends, an actively heated chamber, and an integrated exhaust/air-filtration system. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxNNjZWMjNaSjl0MkwzSmtxSDNBQmxyTy1XWlE3bFVfWUtqWnk4R1BxeU1rNEtCSEpkN1NHeElDeDBIZlRVVmNXejZSR3pOZklEYm0yZWpvNFpjRWtWeV9kZlZSaTRnY2d1NFRhTVd5OVFuNWxFV1AyLW5nV1UzZFBvSks0NA?oc=5

Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🚨 Elegoo Announces Jupiter 2 Featuring Massive Build Size Elegoo announced the massive Jupiter 2 resin 3D printer. The post Elegoo Announces Jupiter 2 Featuring Massive Build Size appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/elegoo-announces-jupiter-2-featuring-massive-build-size

🦺 Lincotek receives FDA clearance for SportLinc syndesmosis device Lincotek has obtained 510(k) clearance (K252081) from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its SportLinc Syndesmosis Device, a sterile, single-use implant developed to stabilize syndesmotic trauma of the …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 20, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Lincotek-SportLinc-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/lincotek-receives-fda-clearance-for-sportlinc-syndesmosis-device

💻 AMA: Energy 2026: Additive Manufacturing in Energy Is Moving Beyond Pilots Here’s What’s Actually Being Deployed Additive manufacturing in the energy sector has spent the past decade in pilot mode. There is no shortage of case studies, proofs of concept, or conference presentations, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/4-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/ama-energy-2026-additive-manufacturing-in-energy-is-moving-beyond-pilots-heres-whats-actually-being-deployed-250737

📰 WHASER, a 3D printed device for capturing whale data in the field While the Atlantic humpback whale has recovered from being on the brink of extinction in the mid 20th century, the species is still threatened by humans and fishing operations. Entanglement … The post WHASER, a 3D printed device for capturing whale data in the field appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/WHASER_Whale_Wise-4-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/whaser-a-3d-printed-device-for-capturing-whale-data-in-the-field

🏠 LUYTEN 3D and University of Wollongong develop Australia’s first submerged concrete 3D printing system LUYTEN 3D, in collaboration with researchers from the University of Wollongong (UOW), has unveiled what the partners described as Australia’s first submerged 3D concrete printing system, along with a world-first …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 20, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/LUYTEN3D-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/luyten-3d-and-university-of-wollongong-develop-australias-first-submerged-concrete-3d-printing-system

🚀 Sinterit’s 3D Printing Academy Makes Serious Manufacturing Education Free and Accessible Polish 3D printer manufacturer Sinterit has launched its free online 3D Printing Academy, and the premise will be familiar to anyone who has spent time in the AM industry. For all the noise around 3D printing, genuinely useful knowledge about specific technologies is surprisingly hard to come by, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 20, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/3D-Printing-Academy-1-3DPI-1-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/sinterits-3d-printing-academy-makes-serious-manufacturing-education-free-and-accessible-250629

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #103 - 2026-04-20
item.description:
🚨 Xcellence made simple - Bambu Lab presents the X2D No more compromises with supports Reported by Bambu Lab on Apr 14, 2026. Key specs: 2 hotends, an actively heated chamber, and an integrated exhaust/air-filtration system. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/8d/d9/8dd9f85b-21c3-4782-bba8-8778cd8f2f93/content/images/2026/04/X2D-00-1.jpg Read more ? https://blog.bambulab.com/xcellence-made-simple-bambu-lab-presents-the-x2d

🚨 Elegoo announces the Jupiter 2 resin 3D printer for $949, early bird price of $849 — new model offers massive print volume but is still physically smaller than previous models - Tom's Hardware Elegoo announces the Jupiter 2 resin 3D printer for $949, early bird price of $849 — new model offers massive print volume but is still physically smaller than previous models Tom's Hardware Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 16, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🖨 UltiMaker takes on exclusive Americas distribution of Tectonic-3D’s filament portfolio UltiMaker, a provider of professional desktop and industrial 3D printing platforms, has been named the exclusive distributor for Tectonic-3D across North and South America. The deal builds on a pre-existing … The post UltiMaker takes on exclusive Americas distribution of Tectonic-3D’s filament portfolio appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Ultimaker-Tectonic-3D-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ultimaker-takes-on-exclusive-americas-distribution-of-tectonic-3ds-filament-portfolio

🏠 Singapore’s LTA to build country’s first 3D printed concrete pedestrian bridge Singapore’s Land Transport Authority (LTA) is building the country’s first 3D printed concrete pedestrian bridge, with completion targeted for 2028. The structure will span the Jurong River, connecting residents from … The post Singapore’s LTA to build country’s first 3D printed concrete pedestrian bridge appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Singapore-LTA-concrete-bridge-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/singapores-lta-to-build-countrys-first-3d-printed-concrete-pedestrian-bridge

🏠 Hyperion Robotics Opens New Factory to Scale UK Infrastructure Finnish concrete 3D printing specialist Hyperion Robotics has chosen Flixborough, near Scunthorpe, as the location for its first UK concrete manufacturing facility. The specialist has signed an agreement with Swedish company LKAB Minerals to set up a prefabricated concrete production plant on LKAB’s industrial site in North Lincolnshire, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 19, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/New-Factory-2-2048x1374-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/hyperion-robotics-opens-new-factory-to-scale-uk-infrastructure-250697

💻 Don’t miss the best 3D printing installations at Milan Design Week 2026 Milan Design Week 2026, running April 20–26 alongside the Salone del Mobile fair, features a notable concentration of 3D printing applications across architecture, product design, and material experimentation —... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 19, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/AURA-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/dont-miss-the-best-3d-printing-installations-at-milan-design-week-2026

🚀 HOOPS AI reaches general availability with new features to tackle the CAD-ML gap Introduced as a technology preview in late 2025, Tech Soft 3D has officially launched HOOPS AI framework purpose-built to integrate CAD data into machine learning (ML) pipelines. The product is now generally available, building on a successful beta program with over 30 companies, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 19, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/demo-hv-mockup-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/hoops-ai-reaches-general-availability-with-new-features-to-tackle-the-cad-ml-gap-250695

💻 SPARTA: The 3D-Printed Drone Designed by Soldiers for the Battlefield Drones have become indispensable to modern warfare. From frontline reconnaissance to target acquisition, unmanned aerial systems are now as critical to ground operations as any weapon in a soldier’s arsenal, reported by 3D Natives on Apr 19, 2026. Image ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/SPARTA-Drone-Cover.jpg Read more ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/sparta-us-army-3d-printed-drone-16042026

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #102 - 2026-04-19
item.description:
🚀 3D printed supercapacitor plane flies for 45 seconds off a four second long charge British engineer Tom Stanton has built a 3D printed fixed-wing aircraft weighing 15.6 grams, and which is powered by a single 10 farad supercapacitor charged via a hand crank generator. … The post 3D printed supercapacitor plane flies for 45 seconds off a four second long charge appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Tom-Stanton-drone-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/3d-printed-supercapacitor-plane-flies-for-45-seconds-off-a-four-second-long-charge

📰 Barilla’s ARTISIA brings 3D printed pasta to Milan Design Week with Edible Reveries ARTISIA, Barilla’s 3D printed pasta brand, will present Edible Reveries at via Melzo 34 in Milan’s Porta Venezia Design District from April 21 to 26, staging its first solo exhibition at … The post Barilla’s ARTISIA... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 18, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/01.-EDIBLE-REVERIES-Studio-Yellowdot-x-ARTISIA-Horizontal-LOW-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/barillas-artisia-brings-3d-printed-pasta-to-milan-design-week-with-edible-reveries

📰 CUPRA brings “Beyond the Known” to Milan Design Week 2026 with an exploration of parametric design For the past few years, CUPRA has made Milan Design Week one of the biggest events on its calendar to present the latest design innovations. In 2025, VoxelMatters had the … The post CUPRA brings “Beyond the Known” to Milan Design Week 2026 with an exploration of parametric design appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/cover-cupra-brera_f8b6d736b13de5adc354aaaae65ded88-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/cupra-brings-beyond-the-known-to-milan-design-week-2026-with-an-exploration-of-parametric-design

💻 Penn State researchers develop 3D printed bioelectrodes tailored to individual brain geometry Researchers at Penn State University have developed a method for 3D printing soft brain electrodes shaped to match the unique surface geometry of individual patients, with the goal of improving … The post Penn State... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 18, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Penn-State-Brain-Study-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/penn-state-researchers-develop-3d-printed-bioelectrodes-tailored-to-individual-brain-geometry

🚀 Australia Turns to 3D Printing to Rebuild Its Sovereign Supply of a Critical Naval Alloy A consortium of Australian universities, research institutions, and an advanced manufacturing firm has launched a collaborative initiative to tackle a pressing challenge in naval defense: the domestic production of... The project, backed by funding from the Queensland Defence Sciences Alliance (QDSA), brings together…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 18, 2026. 🖨 FABULOUS and AMT Certify a Complete SLS Workflow for Food-Contact 3D Printed Parts French materials developer FABULOUS and UK-based post-processing specialist Additive Manufacturing Technologies (AMT) have jointly validated a complete workflow for producing food-contact-compliant parts using SLS 3D... The process pairs FABULOUS’s DETECT PA11 bio-based polyamide material with AMT’s PostPro Pure vapor smoothing consumable, and has been confirmed by an accredited independent laboratory against both U.S, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 18, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Detect-montage-BQVF-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/fabulous-and-amt-certify-a-complete-sls-workflow-for-food-contact-3d-printed-parts-250683

While laser powder bed fusion has long delivered high-performance parts in materials like titanium and Inconel, the price of entry…, reported by 3D Natives on Apr 17, 2026. The study also saw contributions from UC Berkeley, Tarleton State University in Texas, the Terasaki Institute for Biomedical Innovation in Los Angeles, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 17, 2026. 🖨 EOS Takes Full Ownership of Metal Powder Specialist Metalpine Industrial 3D printing firm EOS has completed the acquisition of Austrian metal powder manufacturer Metalpine GmbH, moving from partial shareholder to sole owner after a multi-year investment relationship. The deal deepens EOS’s strategic commitment to materials, with particular emphasis on titanium, a segment where customer demand continues to outpace supply chain capacity, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Metalalpine-43-Quad-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/eos-takes-full-ownership-of-metal-powder-specialist-metalpine-250591

🏠 Eurobearings Integrates Meltio’s Wire Laser Technology to Cut Bearing Production Lead Times by Up to 50% Heavy industry runs on rotating equipment, turbines, cement mills, rolling machinery, and when those systems stop, the financial impact is immediate. Bearings are the components that keep them turning, and for nearly three decades Italian manufacturer Eurobearings has been building them for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) across energy, oil and gas,, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Eurobearings-18-2048x1639-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/eurobearings-integrates-meltios-wire-laser-technology-to-cut-bearing-production-lead-times-by-up-to-50-250575
